issues.description: Second effect has trigger 'OnKO' but text states '[Opponent's Turn] [On K.O.]' — this is a conditional duration, not a simple trigger. Should use 'OnKO' with duration constraint or clarify if this only applies during opponent's turn.

Action is 'ForceDiscard' but text says 'places 1 card from their hand at the bottom of their deck' — this is returning to deck, not discarding. Should use 'ReturnToHand' or similar deck-bottom placement, not ForceDiscard.
Missing duration constraint. Text '[Opponent's Turn]' indicates this effect only triggers during opponent's turn, but DSL has no duration field to enforce this.
